positive: Stylized line art illustration of a cosmic mountain range under a nebula sky. The mountains should have geometric, crystalline structures, appearing both terrestrial and ethereal. A small, elegant celestial creature (like a stylized phoenix or griffin) soars across the peaks. Use deep indigos, cosmic purples, vibrant teals, and glowing golds. Minimalist, sophisticated, high-contrast silhouette aesthetic suitable for apparel printing. Clean lines, perfect symmetry, centered composition. Ink wash texture meets vector illustration style. Isolated on a clean white background for maximum print contrast.
negative: blur, artifacts, low resolution, grainy, watermark, text, signature, logo, copyright, dirty, messy, amateur, bad anatomy, extra limbs, distorted, noise, oversaturated, gradient background
